title: Night Shift proposal: First successful dictation
reason: High CER in low volume dictation scenarios
patch_text: Implement volume normalization in audio processing pipeline
validation_test: Test CER with normalized vs unnormalized audio samples

title: Night Shift proposal: License / activation
reason: The current license activation process may not be clearly communicated to users, leading to confusion and potential drop-offs during activation.
patch_text: Implement a guided activation flow that clearly explains the license activation process, including how to enter the license key and what to expect after activation.
validation_test: Monitor activation drop-off rates and user feedback after implementing the new activation flow.

title: Night Shift proposal: Onboarding
reason: Users may struggle with understanding the product promise during onboarding, leading to lower conversion rates.
patch_text: Add a brief, animated demo video showcasing the core promise (speak -> text appears -> paste anywhere) during onboarding.
validation_test: Measure CTR before and after implementation.

title: Night Shift proposal: Permissions
reason: Permissions setup success rate is low
patch_text: Implement a guided permission setup flow with clear explanations and real-time feedback
validation_test: Check if users can successfully grant permissions without assistance

title: Night Shift proposal: Error messages
reason: Error messages in French are visible in the frontend and not localized using the i18n system.
patch_text: Migrate French error messages to the i18n system or move them to the frontend error display layer.
validation_test: Check if error messages are correctly displayed in French after migration.

title: Night Shift proposal: First successful dictation
reason: Users may struggle with the initial setup steps leading to a low first_dictation_success_rate.
patch_text: Implement a guided onboarding flow that simplifies the permission setup and model selection steps before initiating the first dictation.
validation_test: Monitor the first_dictation_success_rate pre and post-implementation to assess the impact.

title: Night Shift proposal: License / activation
reason: The current license activation process may not be clearly communicated to users, potentially leading to confusion and reduced activation rates.
patch_text: Implement a guided onboarding flow during license activation that explains the purpose of the license key and how it enables offline functionality and privacy.
validation_test: Monitor the activation success rate and first_dictation_success_rate before and after implementing the guided flow.

title: Night Shift proposal: Error messages
reason: Error messages in French are not consistently localized across the frontend and backend, leading to a fragmented user experience.
patch_text: Audit and align all error messages in French to ensure they are consistently displayed in the frontend and backend, using the i18n system where applicable.
validation_test: Check that error messages in French are consistently displayed across all user interfaces and that they match the expected translations.

title: Night Shift proposal: First successful dictation
reason: The first launch hint is not dismissed after the first real transcription, which could confuse users about the next steps.
patch_text: Implement a check to dismiss the first launch hint immediately after the first real transcription event.
validation_test: Check if the hint is dismissed immediately after the first transcription event in the app.

title: Night Shift proposal: License / activation
reason: The activation process may be confusing for new users, as indicated by the presence of an activation-banner in the UI.
patch_text: Simplify the activation-banner message to clearly explain the next steps required for activation, ensuring users understand how to proceed without confusion.
validation_test: Monitor activation flow metrics before and after the change to assess improvement.

title: Night Shift proposal: Onboarding
reason: The onboarding flow may not effectively guide users through the first successful dictation, which is the most important activation event.
patch_text: Implement a guided tour during the first run that highlights the key steps to achieve the first successful dictation, such as granting permissions, setting up the model, and initiating the dictation process.
validation_test: Monitor the first_dictation_success_rate before and after implementing the guided tour.
